name: @ever-works/notion-extractor-plugin
description: Notion Page Extractor - Extract content from Notion pages using the Notion API or Splitbee

plugin.name: Notion Page Extractor
plugin.description: Extract content from Notion pages. Supports both public pages (via Splitbee) and private pages (via Notion API).
